title: Excessive daytime sleepiness (hypersomnia) - NHS
text:
alcohol and caffeine create a peaceful sleeping environment if possible, avoid medicines that can cause drowsiness avoid working late into the night It might also help to talk to your family and friends about your excessive daytime sleepiness so they're aware of it.
Information: 
If you're diagnosed with hypersomnia you'll need to tell the Driver and Vehicle Licensing Agency (DVLA) and you may not be able to drive.
Find out about the rules on excessive sleepiness and driving from GOV.UK
